arts.ttl: Bayern Munich defender Sacha Boey reveals the most important piece of advice he ever got and what he would advise to younger players
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Then check out our Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show on Patreon, Spotify or below:

arts.ttl: Bundesliga market values: Harry Kane drops by 10% - Jamie Gittens most valuable Dortmund player
arts.sum: With one matchday to go before the winter break, Transfermarkt has updated the market values of 493 Bundesliga players, and the two most valuable players in the league became even more valuable....

arts.ttl: Bayern youngster wants loan move: "Can't keep playing under-23's"
arts.sum: Bayern Munich youngster Nestory Irankunda has revealed that he wants to go out on loan in a bid to find more first-team football.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies talks with Bayern Munich on ice as Real Madrid target keeps options open
arts.sum: The future of Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies has been a tricky saga to follow, with a number of twists already taken. He looks set to enter the last six months of his contract without an agreement with anyone. According to The Daily Briefing, Davies is keeping his options open going into the January transfer […] The post Alphonso Davies talks with Bayern Munich on ice as Real Madrid target keeps options open appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Bayern duo miss final training session before Leipzig clash
arts.sum: According to Bild, Konrad Laimer and Serge Gnabry both missed Bayern Munich's final training session ahead of Friday's Bundesliga clash with RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. RB Leipzig preview: Kompany looking for a response
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany will challenge his side to bounce back from their recent defeat to Mainz when they welcome RB Leipzig to the Allianz Arena for Friday’s Bundesliga contest.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, Arsenal, Liverpool, Chelsea, and Manchester City all want Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala; Manchester United to chase Spurs star?; Thiago headed back to FC Barcelona?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Arsenal FC, Liverpool FC, Manchester United, and Paris Saint-Germain are all keeping an eye on former Bayern Munich prospect and current Juventus attacker Kenan Yildiz: Aside of Real Madrid and FC Barcelona, at least four deep-pocketed Premier League clubs want to make a move for Musiala this summer — Arsenal FC, Liverpool FC, Chelsea FC, and Manchester City :

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Konrad Laimer missed training; Josip Stanišić, Tarek Buchmann work out; RB Leipzig’s walking wounded; and MORE!
arts.sum: With Sacha Boey and Josip Stanišić already ruled out for Friday’s Bundesliga match against RB Leipzig, Laimer missed training on Tuesday, practiced on Wednesday, and was out again on Thursday — this time, though, it had nothing to do with an injury. If Laimer misses the game, Raphaël Guerreiro could fill in at right-back, while Alphonso Davies takes the reins at left-back.

arts.ttl: What’s up, doc? RB Leipzig looking for rabbit-like effort vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: RB Leipzig coach Marco Rose has overseen a crazy first part of the season for this club as it heads into a Bundesliga tilt against Bayern Munich . Finally, Rose is expecting Bayern Munich star striker Harry Kane to return, which should complicate matters for RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: “Decisive moment” nears as Bayern Munich CEO aims for win over RB Leipzig
arts.sum: The last game of the year is important, we want to finish the year properly, in other words: beat Leipzig,” Dreesen told Tz’s Hanna Raif (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). Bayern Munich took a step back last weekend in a 2-1 loss to Mainz 05, which put a lot of emphasis on this Friday’s final match before the Winterpause, which is against RB Leipzig.
